calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Dismissal - No Appearance

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Interrogatories; Req. For Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

ZACHARY A. TORAN, ESQ., NICK PACHECO LAW GROUP, TEL. 415.850.9067, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF ONEWEST BANK, FSB.

PAMELA SMITH, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

The Pro Tem Judge has adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF ONEWEST BANK, FSB'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED without prejudice. Courtesy copies of the moving papers were not provided to chambers as required by Local Rule 2.6(B). SEE WRITTEN ORDER. PARTIES SERVED WITH COPY OF WRITTEN ORDER IN COURT.

JUDGE PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN, NOT REPORTED.

ZACHARY A. TORAN, ESQ., NICK PACHECO LAW GROUP, TEL. 415.850.9067, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF ONEWEST BANK, FSB.

PAMELA SMITH, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

The Pro Tem Judge has adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF ONEWEST BANK, FSB'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED without prejudice. Courtesy copies of the moving papers were not provided to chambers as required by Local Rule 2.6(B). SEE WRITTEN ORDER. PARTIES SERVED WITH COPY OF WRITTEN ORDER IN COURT.

JUDGE PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN, NOT REPORTED.
